get.description: Lists alertmanager alerts with optional state and label filtering for the current user scope.

200.description: The alerts visible to the current caller.

post.description: Submits one or more alerts to alertmanager for processing.

200.description: The submission result including the number of alerts accepted.

delete.description: Deletes alerts in alertmanager that match the provided label filter set.

200.description: The deletion result for the matched alerts.

get.description: Lists grouped alerts from alertmanager with optional label filtering.

200.description: Grouped alerts returned by alertmanager.

post.description: Removes stale shared-group visibility references for users that were removed from a group.

200.description: The counts of updated records and pruned silences.

get.description: Lists notification channel types that are currently enabled for alertmanager integrations.

200.description: The channel types allowed by integration policy.

get.description: Lists silences visible to the current user with optional label and expiration filtering.

200.description: The silences visible to the current caller.

post.description: Creates a new silence in alertmanager for the current user scope.

200.description: The created silence identifier and operation result.

get.description: Returns a single silence when it exists and is visible to the current user.

200.description: The requested silence.

put.description: Updates an existing silence when the caller owns it and still has access.

200.description: The updated silence identifier and operation result.

delete.description: Deletes an existing silence when the caller owns it and still has access.

200.description: The deletion result for the specified silence.

post.description: Toggles whether a shared silence is hidden for the current user.

200.description: The hide state applied to the silence.

get.description: Returns alertmanager runtime status and cluster metadata.

200.description: The current alertmanager status payload.

get.description: Lists alertmanager receiver names available for routing and inspection.

200.description: The configured alertmanager receiver names.

post.description: Imports alert rules from YAML, optionally previewing the parsed rules without persisting them.

200.description: The imported or previewed rule set with creation and update counts.

get.description: Lists alert rules visible to the current user with pagination support.

200.description: The alert rules visible to the current caller.

post.description: Creates a new alert rule and synchronizes it to the backing Mimir rule set.

get.description: Lists public alert rules for the default tenant after public endpoint protections are enforced.

200.description: The public alert rules available for the default tenant.

get.description: Lists metric names available in Mimir for the resolved organization scope.

200.description: The resolved organization identifier and metric names.

get.description: Evaluates a PromQL query against Mimir for the resolved organization scope.

200.description: The evaluated query result returned from Mimir.

get.description: Lists label names available in Mimir for the resolved organization scope.

200.description: The resolved organization identifier and metric label names.

get.description: Lists values for a metric label in Mimir for the resolved organization scope.

200.description: The resolved organization identifier and metric label values.

get.description: Returns a single alert rule when it exists and is visible to the current user.

200.description: The requested alert rule.

put.description: Updates an existing alert rule and synchronizes affected Mimir rule sets.

200.description: The updated alert rule.

delete.description: Deletes an alert rule and synchronizes the backing Mimir rule set.

200.description: The deletion result for the alert rule.

post.description: Toggles whether a shared alert rule is hidden for the current user.

200.description: The hide state applied to the alert rule.

post.description: Builds a synthetic alert from the rule and sends test notifications through its configured channels.

200.description: The test execution result across the configured notification channels.

get.description: Lists notification channels visible to the current user.

200.description: The notification channels visible to the current caller.

post.description: Creates a new notification channel for the current tenant scope.

get.description: Returns a single notification channel when it exists and is visible to the current user.

200.description: The requested notification channel.

put.description: Updates an existing notification channel in the current tenant scope.

200.description: The updated notification channel.

delete.description: Deletes an existing notification channel when the caller has access.

200.description: The deletion result for the notification channel.

post.description: Toggles whether a shared notification channel is hidden for the current user.

200.description: The hide state applied to the notification channel.

post.description: Sends a test notification through the specified notification channel.

200.description: The test delivery result for the notification channel.

get.description: Lists alert incidents visible to the current user with optional status, visibility, and group filters.

200.description: The incidents visible to the current caller.

get.description: Returns an aggregated summary of incidents visible to the current user.

200.description: Aggregated incident summary counts and breakdowns.

patch.description: Updates an incident's status, assignment, Jira metadata, or visibility settings.

200.description: The updated incident.

get.description: Returns the tenant-level Jira configuration with secrets masked into presence flags.

200.description: The current tenant Jira configuration.

put.description: Updates the tenant-level Jira configuration used when an explicit integration is not selected.

200.description: The saved tenant Jira configuration.

get.description: Lists Jira projects using either the tenant Jira config or a selected integration.

200.description: The available Jira projects for the resolved credentials.

get.description: Lists Jira issue types for a project using either the tenant Jira config or a selected integration.

200.description: The available Jira issue types for the requested project.

get.description: Lists Jira projects using a specific Jira integration.

200.description: The Jira projects available through the selected integration.

get.summary: List Jira Issue Types By Integration
get.description: Lists Jira issue types for a project using a specific Jira integration.

200.description: The Jira issue types available through the selected integration.

get.description: Lists Jira integrations visible to the current user, including hidden state when requested.

200.description: The Jira integrations visible to the current caller.

post.description: Creates a new Jira integration for the current tenant.

200.description: The created Jira integration with sensitive values masked.

put.description: Updates an existing Jira integration owned by the current user.

200.description: The updated Jira integration with sensitive values masked.

delete.description: Deletes a Jira integration owned by the current user and unlinks it from incidents.

200.description: The deletion result and count of incidents unlinked from the integration.

post.description: Toggles whether a shared Jira integration is hidden for the current user.

200.description: The hide state applied to the Jira integration.

post.description: Creates a Jira issue for an incident and stores the Jira linkage on the incident record.

200.description: The incident updated with Jira linkage metadata.

post.description: Backfills incident notes to the linked Jira issue while skipping notes already present.

200.description: The note synchronization result for the linked Jira issue.

get.description: Lists comments from the Jira issue linked to the specified incident when credentials are available.

200.description: The Jira comments associated with the incident's linked issue.

post.description: Receives general alert webhook payloads and dispatches notifications for the inferred tenant.

200.description: The webhook processing result for the submitted alerts.

post.description: Receives critical alert webhook payloads and dispatches critical notifications for the inferred tenant.

200.description: The webhook processing result for the submitted critical alerts.

post.description: Receives warning alert webhook payloads and dispatches warning notifications for the inferred tenant.

200.description: The webhook processing result for the submitted warning alerts.

get.description: Returns a lightweight health status for the notifier service.

200.description: The current health status for the notifier service.

get.description: Runs readiness checks required for notifier to serve traffic.

200.description: The readiness result and individual dependency checks.
